    "Flange bolt-hole rotation is incorrect (two-holing missed during fit-up)."

  "actions": [
    "Cut or unbolt the misaligned spool.",

  "rationale": "The spool erection is roughed in but cannot be accepted because the flange bolt-hole rotation is incorrect (missed two-holing), which violates standard piping practices and project isometric drawings. The work is marked as fail and requires rework to correct the alignment before it can proceed to testing and inspection.",
